Employee-Exp service:
"isAppFeedbackEnabled": true,
"cutoffTimeBetweenWISAppFeedback": {
"employee":0.0,
"manager":0.0,
"admin":0.0
},
"cutoffTimeForSkipWISAppFeedback":720.0

Note:
This is the structure of the way these properties work. 
If isAppFeedbackEnabled is set to true, then Internal App Feedback will appear. 
If cutoffTimeBetweenWISAppFeedback is set to 0, it will appear after every booking creation. 
If cutoffTimeForSkipWISAppFeedback is set to 720 (hours ~ 30 days), the internal app feedback will appear once in 30 days (720 hours) after every booking creation.
